summary: Daily Dashboard tested end-to-end. Backend: 8/8 new pytest tests passed for the dashboard rebuild (new fields score_components/emergency_fund/emergency_months/emergency_target_months=6/monthly_surplus, GET /api/alerts shape + seeded-signal content, POST /api/ai/daily-advice basic/cache/deep + auth). Real Claude Sonnet 4.5 calls succeed; same-day cache returns identical generated_at/summary/items; deep=true returns deep_analysis (>50 chars). Frontend mobile (390x844): login as test1@plos.app/test123 lands on Home. All 6 sections render with correct testIDs — Header greeting 'GOOD AFTERNOON, Test' + 'Friday, June 26' + ScoreRing 64 in yellow ring (50-74 band correct); 2x2 metric grid ($8.9K / $3.4K / +$5.5K / $530K); Emergency Fund Runway '9.2 / 6 mo — Fully funded — $31,300 in liquid savings'; AI Daily Advice card with 3 numbered items referencing real seeded data (Chase Sapphire $4,200 @ 22.99% APR), Refresh button regenerates content via Claude, Deeper Analysis triggers ~5s Claude call and renders deep-analysis-text (1309 chars). 5 alert rows render with severity dots, icons, titles, time labels; tapping the first debt alert navigates to /finance. All 8 module tiles render (finance/career/investments/debt/deals/travel/legal/health); tapping module-tile-investments navigates to /module/investments which shows TSP $78,200, IRA $24,500, Brokerage $12,800. No critical bugs. Deprecated-package note carried over from iteration_1: expo-av still pinned in package.json (use expo-audio/expo-video). Minor RN Web deprecation warnings (shadow*, pointerEvents) remain non-blocking. Daily-advice cache works correctly.

issues: Console deprecation warnings persist: 'shadow*' style props (use boxShadow), props.pointerEvents (use style.pointerEvents). Non-blocking on RN Web.

react_native_issues.issue: Version drift vs Expo SDK 54 expected minors: expo@54.0.34 (expected ~54.0.35), expo-font@14.0.11 (expected ~14.0.12), expo-router@6.0.23 (expected ~6.0.24). Visible at expo startup. Reference: /app/frontend/package.json

action_items: Run `yarn expo install --fix` to align expo/expo-font/expo-router to SDK 54 expected minors (warning prints on every expo restart).
Replace deprecated shadow* style props with boxShadow and props.pointerEvents with style.pointerEvents in components/styles to silence RN Web warnings (cosmetic).
(Carry-over from iteration_1) Modularize /app/backend/server.py (now ~1297 lines, grew from 990) into routers (auth, finance, career, health, ai, dashboard, alerts) — exceeds 700-line guideline.
(Carry-over) Audit for deprecated Expo packages — e.g., replace expo-av usage with expo-audio/expo-video if present.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now ~1297 LOC — strongly recommend splitting per <700 line guideline.
Daily-advice cache keyed by `daily-{user_id}-{date}-{short|deep}` — correct; force=true bypasses, otherwise persisted in daily_advice_cache collection.
/api/alerts correctly sorts by severity (urgent > warning > info > good) and excludes _id.
Dashboard score_components, emergency_fund, emergency_months, emergency_target_months=6, monthly_surplus all returned and verified.
All env vars used via os.environ; frontend uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL; no hardcoded URLs.

All 6 home-screen sections have appropriate testIDs (financial-health-ring, metric-*, emergency-fund-card, ai-daily-advice-card, ai-advice-item-0..2, ai-advice-refresh, deeper-analysis-button, deep-analysis-text, alert-*, module-tile-*) — great for automation.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_dashboard_alerts_ai.py (new — 8 tests for dashboard new fields, alerts, daily-advice basic/cache/deep/auth)

success_rate.backend: 100% (8/8 new dashboard tests; iteration_1 30/30 still valid)
success_rate.frontend: 100% of tested dashboard flows (login, all 6 sections, AI refresh, Deeper Analysis Claude call, alert tap nav to /finance, module-tile-investments nav to /module/investments with TSP/IRA/Brokerage cards)

seed_data_creation: Re-ran POST /api/seed-demo at test start to restore canonical demo data for test1@plos.app.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend URL: https://life-os-hub-32.preview.emergentagent.com. Creds in /app/memory/test_credentials.md. Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/ — test_plos_api.py (30 tests, iteration_1) + test_dashboard_alerts_ai.py (8 tests, iteration_2; AI calls take ~5s each, deep ~8s). Home dashboard rebuilt with 6 sections; all testIDs present and working. Daily-advice is cached per (user, date, mode={short,deep}) — use force=true to invalidate. Score ring color bands: green>75, yellow 50-74 (current user score=64), red<50. Module routes are /module/{key} where key in {finance,career,investments,debt,deals,travel,legal,health}.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no functional regressions found. All 6 dashboard sections + interactions verified working.
